name: School Trip: Joined a Group I'm Not Close To
original_name: 修学旅行で仲良くないグループに入りました
overview: An awkward teen joins a group of popular classmates on a school trip, sparking an unexpected romance with the most popular and charming boy in school.

trailers.title: Morning😎 in "School Trip: Joined a Group I’m Not Close to" EP1 on GagaOOLala!
